text:
There once was a girl named Holly. She loved blueberries. She would go to farms and fill jars halfway full. One year she got sick. Holly couldn’t eat any more blueberries!

She sat in her bedroom, surrounded by blueberry things. A bird swooped down. “Hey,” said the bird.

“A bird!” Holly jumped. It flew away.

She stared out her window.

What bird?

Oh…I think THAT’s one.

She laughed.

Yeah…

Later.

You fell out?

Of course.

She sighed.

The stars?

Of course.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
